nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hi Kesia — wanted to circle back specifically on the halal piece. Three quick questions: (1) Halal requirement for whole wedding, or just specific guests? (2) Need fully halal-certified meat sourcing, or guest-acceptable halal-friendly preparation? (3) Date in August?'
Problem: 'For 200-person halal wedding, what's been hardest about finding caterers who can actually deliver vs say they can?'
Identity: 'Halal-targeted catering at this scale is its own world — what does doing this right look like for you and the family? I want to be honest about what we can and can't do.'
Anchor: 'For 200 with full halal sourcing + Brazilian-influenced menu, $X-Y. If we're in your range, next step is phone call. If not, I'll tell you straight and point to specialists.'

enrichment.strategic_note: Serious, specialized deal. Don't pitch generic Brazilian BBQ. ONE direct re-engagement addressing halal head-on, asking date question, offering honest scoping. If we have real halal capability, flagship wedding ($10K+). If not, refer out and earn future relationship through honesty. Halal weddings travel by word-of-mouth in tight communities — one happy customer brings 5 more.
